Model Armor helps you protect against risks like prompt injection, harmful content, and data leakage in generative AI applications by letting you define policies that filter user prompts and model responses.

Usage: gws [OPTIONS] <COMMAND>

Commands:
  +sanitize-prompt    [Helper] Sanitize a user prompt through a Model Armor template
  +sanitize-response  [Helper] Sanitize a model response through a Model Armor template
  +create-template    [Helper] Create a new Model Armor template
  help                Print this message or the help of the given subcommand(s)

Options:
      --sanitize <TEMPLATE>  Sanitize API responses through a Model Armor template. Requires cloud-platform scope. Format: projects/PROJECT/locations/LOCATION/templates/TEMPLATE. Also reads GWS_SANITIZE_TEMPLATE env var.
      --dry-run              Validate the request locally without sending it to the API
      --format <FORMAT>      Output format: json (default), table, yaml, csv
  -h, --help                 Print help
